title: Video Tutorials | Flag.dol.gov
content:
The FLAG team has assembled the following video tutorials to assist users with navigating the website
- H-2B FY 2020 Best Practices
- How to create a FLAG Account
- Navigating the FLAG Dashboard
- How to Navigate My Account
- How to Navigate My Cases
- How to Navigate My Network
- How to Navigate My Profiles
- How to Navigate Notification Center
- Filling out the Form ETA-9141
- Filling out the Form ETA-9142B
- Filling out the Form ETA-790 and ETA-790A
- Filling out the Form ETA-9142A
- Filling out the Form ETA-9035
- Filling out the Form ETA-9141C

- Filling out the Form ETA-9089
- Form Validation Checks
